Tailored For You

Place a Custom Order

We create anything you envision — clothing, home goods, gifts, and more. Fill out the form below and we'll be in touch within 48 hours to confirm details and pricing.

📋 How it works: Submit your request below → We'll reach out to confirm details & provide a quote → Once approved, we begin production → Your order ships or is ready for pickup. Custom orders typically take 7–14 business days.

By submitting this form you agree to be contacted about your order. All custom orders are final once production begins.

✦ Your request has been received — we'll be in touch within 48 hours. Thank you. ✦

Meet the Steward

Made With Meaning

"Hello everyone! My name is Makayla, and I am the faithful steward of OEAIH. God entrusted this business to me, and it's an honor to serve you with excellence, caring for your projects and custom needs with intentionality and faithfulness. I look forward to making your custom designs come to life, On Earth As It Is In Heaven! Have it God's way… have it OEAIH! Blessings!"


OEAIH stands for On Earth As It Is In Heaven — rooted in Matthew 6:10 and built on the belief that we are called to reflect Heaven's culture here on Earth. We specialize in custom merchandise for businesses, ministries, and individuals — from branded items and event materials to personalized products like mugs, cups, and more.

✦

Intentional

Every piece is made with a purpose greater than fashion.

◈

Custom

Anything you can imagine, we can create for you.

◇

Quality

Premium materials and craftsmanship on every order.

✧

Faithful

Built for people who live with faith and intentionality.
